code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      mut nb = b
      if b >= 65 and b <= 90
        nb = ((b - 65 + 13) % 26) + 65
      else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
        nb = ((b - 97 + 13) % 26) + 97
      end
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(nb)}"
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
